method: Train-only global, cation-family, exact cation-pair, and exact spacegroup mean baselines on the frozen MD-0002 formation-energy axis.

frozen_contract.fallback: global train mean for unseen groups

limitations: Computed DFT Materials Project values only; no experimental measurements.
The narrowed slice contains 362 materials, below the original 600-row target but accepted by the maintainer before scoring.
Exact cation-pair and spacegroup means are simple train-only comparators, not learned physical laws; unseen groups fall back to the global train mean.
Leave-one-group-out views are extrapolation stress tests and can force grouped baselines to their global fallback by construction.
Formation energy is evaluated alone; band gap is not scored or pooled.
No material ranking, synthesis, device, biomedical, or materials-law claim is made.
